brand_baseline: Evidence for human interpretation — consent-bound, on-device multimodal capture.
email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
feature_affect_desc: Oyon senses emotion and attention on-device — consent-bound; camera frames never leave the browser.
feature_analytics_desc: Timelines, sequences and transition networks preserve how learners reason — not just the outcome.
feature_labs_desc: Order investigations, wait for results and interpret real reports under time pressure.
feature_patient_desc: Dynamic vitals, deterioration and alarms — patients respond in text, voice and an animated avatar.
feature_team_desc: Nurse, consultant, family and debrief discussant — each with its own persona and knowledge boundary.
first_user_admin_note: First user will automatically become an administrator
footer_tagline: Virtual Patient Platform for Clinical Training
hero_headline: The patient changes while you're still thinking.
hero_sub: Rohy is an AI-powered, high-fidelity virtual patient platform for clinical training. Take a history, examine, order investigations, treat and debrief — while vitals evolve, alarms fire and every decision has visible consequences.
invite_code_optional: Optional — leave blank if you weren't given one.
invite_code_placeholder: Paste or type your invite code
invite_invalid_exhausted: That invite has already been used the maximum number of times.
invite_invalid_expired: That invite has expired. Ask whoever sent it for a new one.
invite_invalid_not_found: That invite code is not valid. Check it, or ask whoever sent it for a new one.
invite_invalid_revoked: That invite has been withdrawn. Ask whoever sent it for a new one.
invite_valid: You have been invited to join this platform.
password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters with an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter and a number
registration_closed_hint: Accounts are created by an administrator. Contact your administrator for access.
signin_continue: Sign in to continue to Rohy.
username_too_short: Username must be at least 3 characters
